title: Anthropic Knowledge Work Plugins
voiceScript: What if AI worked like an org chart for your whole team, not just a chat window? Most people paste generic prompts into a box. It forgets your context and drifts from how you actually work. Anthropic's open-source Knowledge Work Plugins fix that. Role-based packages of skills, slash commands, tool connectors, and sub-agents, one tuned per job. It ships with 11 ready-made roles, four building blocks each, and it is completely free. AI should make every person an expert in their domain, not sit there as a toy. Start with one workflow, not everything at once. Follow for more.

scenes.voiceText: What if AI worked like an org chart for your whole team, not just a chat window?
scenes.headline: An *org chart* for your AI

scenes.voiceText: Most people paste generic prompts into a box. It forgets your context and drifts from how you actually work.
scenes.headline: Generic prompts *drift* fast

scenes.voiceText: Anthropic's open-source Knowledge Work Plugins fix that. Role-based packages of skills, slash commands, tool connectors, and sub-agents, one tuned per job.
scenes.headline: Zero to an *operating system*

scenes.voiceText: It ships with 11 ready-made roles, four building blocks each, and it is completely free.
scenes.headline: Open Source

scenes.voiceText: AI should make every person an expert in their domain, not sit there as a toy.
scenes.headline: Make everyone an *expert*

scenes.voiceText: Start with one workflow, not everything at once. Follow for more.
scenes.cta: Ready to make AI your operating system?

source: Anthropic Knowledge Work Plugins - open-source (Apache 2.0) role-specific packages for Claude Cowork and Claude Code. Turns agent setup into a team-distributed operating system / 'org chart for agents' via file-based markdown + JSON config. Each plugin = 4 components: Skills (domain workflows), Commands (slash commands like /sales:call-prep), Connectors (MCP servers into tools), Sub-agents (fan-out work). 11 out-of-the-box roles (Productivity, Sales, Customer Support, Product, Marketing, Legal, Finance, Data, Enterprise Search, Bio Research, Plugin Mgmt). 12-step roadmap across 4 phases: Context -> Fire -> Extend -> Scale. Best practice: start small, one narrow skill per job, review like code diffs, prune stale skills to avoid prompt bloat.
